nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet does not exist'.

nas-deploy/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet import with jakarta.servlet import for FilterChain.

nas-music/pom.xml.general_idea: Update MySQL connector dependency to the new groupId and artifactId required for Java 21 compatibility.
nas-music/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not support Java 21; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is required for modern JDK support.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Migrate javax.servlet imports to jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available in Spring Boot 3.x; using them causes compile errors due to missing packages.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Migrate javax.validation imports to jakarta.validation to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on JDK 21/Spring Boot 3.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on Spring Boot 3 / Java 21.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: Class javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest not found on classpath; Spring Boot 3 uses jakarta.servlet namespace, causing compile errors if javax imports are retained.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.transaction package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.transaction does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (used by Spring Boot 3); code using javax.servlet imports will fail to compile due to missing class definitions.

nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 21 and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error due to missing class.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks Jakarta EE 9+ namespace support required by modern libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target version is not updated to match the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve compatibility issues between Lombok and MapStruct in newer environments.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct may fail to process Lombok-generated getters/setters correctly, leading to compilation errors or runtime mapping failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate validation API from javax.validation to jakarta.validation-api to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21 ecosystems use Jakarta EE namespaces; javax.validation classes are no longer available, causing compile errors.
